title: delissea lydgatei
intro: Delissea lydgatei, also known as the Hawaiian heather or mountain heather, is a species of flowering plant native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Delissea lydgatei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Delissea lydgatei can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in tincture or salve form to apply topically to the skin.
